mealprep.title: Before we start…
mealprep.subtitle: let's meal plan!
mealprep.body: Our goal is to do 1 grocery run a month only! All three recipes are dump-and-bake, one-pan, and budget-friendly.

mealprep.title: Our goal
mealprep.subtitle: 1 grocery run a month only!
mealprep.body: We designed this meal plan so every ingredient is used before it expires.

mealprep.title: We have 3 recipes this month
mealprep.subtitle: Breakfast/Snack + Lunch/Dinner
mealprep.body: Brown Sugar Apple Muffins for breakfast. Chicken Casserole OR Chicken Fajitas for lunch and dinner.

mealprep.title: Our goal is to be as lazy as possible!
mealprep.subtitle: We want to minimize cook time
mealprep.body: Make your breakfast muffins on Sundays — just 40 minutes, once a week.

mealprep.title: Enjoy muffins all week
mealprep.subtitle: 14 servings → 2 muffins a day × 7 days
mealprep.body: Bake once on Sunday and you're covered for the entire week.

mealprep.title: For lunch/dinner…
mealprep.subtitle: Choose between Casserole 🥘 or Fajitas 🥙
mealprep.body: Pick whichever one sounds good. Each batch lasts 3–4 days.

mealprep.title: Cook twice a week
mealprep.subtitle: Sundays and Wednesdays — 45 mins each
mealprep.body: Muffins and your lunch/dinner can bake at the same time — total cook time is only 90 mins/week!

mealprep.title: Total monthly cost: $265
mealprep.subtitle: Muffins $49 · Casserole $113 · Fajitas $103
mealprep.body: One grocery run. One month of meals. Huge savings.

mealprep.title: And they're all dump-and-bake!
mealprep.subtitle: Requiring minimal cooking ability
mealprep.body: No fancy technique needed — just chop, dump, and bake.

steps.title: Step 1: Grocery Shop!
steps.subtitle: We need 10 items in total
steps.body: All-Purpose Flour $3.49 · Baking Soda $0.99 · Sea Salt $3.29 · Light Brown Sugar $4.49 · Buttermilk $1.99 · Unsalted Butter $4.29 · Vanilla Extract $8.79 · Honeycrisp Apples $8.99 · Ground Cinnamon $4.29 · Large Eggs $4.49

steps.title: Step 2: Preheat the oven
steps.subtitle: to 375°F (190°C)
steps.body: Set your oven to 375°F before you do anything else so it's ready when you need it.

steps.title: Step 3: Grease a 14-cup muffin tin
steps.subtitle: or line with paper cups
steps.body: Spray each cup with non-stick spray, or drop in paper liners.

steps.title: Step 4: Make the flour mixture
steps.subtitle: Stir together in a large bowl
steps.body: 2¼ cups flour · 1 tsp baking soda · ½ tsp salt

steps.title: Step 5: Make the brown sugar mixture
steps.subtitle: Stir in a separate bowl until sugar dissolves
steps.body: 1½ cups brown sugar · 1 cup buttermilk · 3 tbsp butter · 1 egg · 1 tsp vanilla

steps.title: Step 6: Combine
steps.subtitle: Pour wet mixture into flour mixture
steps.body: Stir until just combined — don't overmix.

steps.title: Step 7: Add the apples
steps.subtitle: Dice apples and fold them in
steps.body: Peel and dice your apples into small cubes, then stir them into the batter.

steps.title: Step 8: Fill the muffin tin
steps.subtitle: Spoon batter into each cup, filling to the top
steps.body: Use a spoon or ice cream scoop for even filling.

steps.title: Step 9: Make the topping
steps.subtitle: Stir together in a small bowl
steps.body: ½ cup brown sugar · ⅓ cup flour · 2 tbsp butter · cinnamon to taste

steps.title: Step 10: Add the topping
steps.subtitle: Sprinkle mixture on top of muffins
steps.body: Use your fingers to crumble the topping evenly over each muffin.

steps.title: Step 11: Bake!
steps.subtitle: 25 minutes
steps.body: Bake until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.

steps.title: Step 12: Serve
steps.subtitle: Enjoy as breakfast or snack!
steps.body: Bored of apples? Swap in pears, peaches, mango, canned pears, or canned peaches — recipe stays the same!

steps.title: Step 1: Grocery Shop!
steps.subtitle: 14 items — comes out to $113 (4 batches!)
steps.body: Cream of Chicken Soup · Cottage Cheese · Sour Cream · Cream Cheese · Creole Seasoning · Onion Powder · Garlic Powder · Rotisserie Pulled Chicken · Italian Parsley · Ground Cinnamon · Golden Round Crackers · Unsalted Butter · Shredded Mozzarella · Scallions

steps.title: Step 2: Preheat the oven
steps.subtitle: to 350°F (175°C)
steps.body: Let your oven fully preheat before the casserole goes in.

steps.title: Step 3: Make the cream mixture
steps.subtitle: Stir together in a medium bowl
steps.body: Cream of chicken soup · cottage cheese · sour cream · cream cheese · Creole seasoning · onion powder · ½ tsp garlic powder

steps.title: Step 4: Add the chicken
steps.subtitle: Fold in chicken and parsley until evenly coated
steps.body: Use rotisserie pulled chicken for the easiest prep.

steps.title: Step 5: Make the cracker topping
steps.subtitle: Combine in a medium bowl
steps.body: Crackers · melted butter · remaining ½ tsp garlic powder

steps.title: Step 6: Assemble
steps.subtitle: Spoon into baking dish, top with mozzarella, then crackers
steps.body: Use an 11×7-inch or 9-inch square baking dish.

steps.title: Step 7: Bake!
steps.subtitle: About 35 minutes
steps.body: Bake until crackers are golden brown and edges are bubbly.

steps.title: Step 8: Serve
steps.subtitle: Garnish with scallions — enjoy as lunch or dinner!
steps.body: Swap the protein: turkey, tuna, or salmon all work. Add veggies: corn, broccoli, spinach, mushrooms, or peas.

steps.title: Step 1: Grocery Shop!
steps.subtitle: 14 items — comes out to ~$103 (4 batches!)
steps.body: Vegetable Oil · Chili Powder · Oregano · Garlic Powder · Onion Powder · Seafood Spice Rub · Scallions · Black Pepper · Cayenne Pepper · Chicken Breast Tenders · Three Pepper Blend · Yellow Onion · Cilantro · Organic Limes

steps.title: Step 2: Preheat the oven
steps.subtitle: to 400°F (200°C)
steps.body: A hot oven is key for getting the peppers nicely roasted.

steps.title: Step 3: Marinate
steps.subtitle: 30 minutes to 2 hours in the fridge
steps.body: Combine oil, chili powder, oregano, garlic powder, onion powder, cumin, salt, black pepper, and cayenne in a large zip-lock bag. Add chicken tenders, bell peppers, and onion.

steps.title: Step 4: Spread on a sheet pan
steps.subtitle: Line with aluminum foil first
steps.body: Spread the marinated chicken and veggies in a single layer on the prepared pan.

steps.title: Step 5: Roast
steps.subtitle: 15–20 minutes, stirring halfway
steps.body: Chicken should reach 165°F internal temperature. Peppers should be softened.

steps.title: Step 6: Finish
steps.subtitle: Sprinkle cilantro and squeeze lime juice over everything
steps.body: Stir to distribute the citrus and herbs evenly.

steps.title: Step 7: Serve
steps.subtitle: Hot with warm tortillas and your favorite toppings
steps.body: Swap it up: shrimp, steak, or tofu for protein. Zucchini or mushrooms for veggies. Curry, Cajun, or jerk for a totally different spice profile.

muffins.title: Preheat the oven!
muffins.instruction: Click the knob to set the correct temperature

muffins.title: Make the flour mixture!
muffins.instruction: Drag the correct ingredients into the bowl
muffins.hint: It's like Coca-Cola… a powder you can't bake without!
muffins.feedback_correct: You got flour, baking soda, and salt — nice work!
muffins.feedback_wrong: Almost! Check what goes in the dry mixture.

muffins.title: Make the brown sugar mixture!
muffins.instruction: Drag the correct ingredients into the bowl
muffins.hint: It's a liquid — without it the brown sugar won't dissolve!
muffins.feedback_correct: Perfect — brown sugar, buttermilk, butter, egg, and vanilla!
muffins.feedback_wrong: Not quite — think about what goes in the WET mixture.

muffins.title: Make the crumble topping!
muffins.instruction: Drag the correct ingredients into the bowl
muffins.hint: It's a fragrant spice — think fall vibes!
muffins.feedback_correct: Brown sugar, flour, butter, and cinnamon — you've got the topping!
muffins.feedback_wrong: Almost! Don't forget the fragrant spice.

muffins.title: Bake!
muffins.instruction: Click the correct bake time on the timer
muffins.hint: It's a tiny bit more than 20 minutes!
muffins.feedback_wrong: Not quite! A tiny bit more than 20.

casserole.title: Make the cream mixture!
casserole.instruction: Drag the correct ingredients into the bowl
casserole.hint: Everything but the chicken, crackers, and cheese goes in here!
casserole.feedback_wrong: Check again — think creamy base ingredients.

fajitas.hint: The marinade is all the spices + oil — not the fresh stuff!
fajitas.feedback_correct: Great marinade — now let it sit!
fajitas.feedback_wrong: Think spices and oil only for the marinade.
